title: The Plot to Assassinate Hitler
writer: Falk Harnack, Werner Jörg Lüddecke, Günther Weisenborn
actors: Wolfgang Preiss, Annemarie Düringer, Robert Freitag
plot: A disillusioned Wehrmacht officer named Colonel Claus von Stauffenberg and his co-conspirators attempt to assassinate Adolf Hitler on 20 July 1944.
